flow_intent: User logs in, views dashboard metrics, adjusts notification settings

findings: Password field lacks visible strength indicator
Social login buttons use inconsistent icon sizes (24px vs 20px)
cross_specialist_findings: Form labels use 12px font but body text is 16px -- hierarchy gap too large

findings: Body text at 14px is below minimum 16px for readability
Primary CTA lacks sufficient contrast (ratio 3.8:1, needs 4.5:1)
Metric cards use 5 different font sizes without clear hierarchy
No empty state for the activity feed section
cross_specialist_findings: Navigation sidebar font weight (300) feels disconnected from bold header treatment (700)

findings: Toggle switches lack aria-label for screen readers
Section dividers use inconsistent spacing (16px vs 24px)
cross_specialist_findings: Save button positioning differs from login CTA placement -- inconsistent action zone

findings.description: Body text size varies: 16px on Login, 14px on Dashboard, 16px on Settings. Dashboard deviates from established baseline.
Primary blue shifts from #3b82f6 on Login to #2563eb on Settings. Delta E of 12 exceeds threshold of 10.

duration_findings: Dashboard metric card entrance at 800ms exceeds sluggish threshold (500ms)
Login form fade-in at 200ms is within micro-interaction range
easing_findings: Settings page uses 'linear' easing for toggle switches -- consider ease-in-out for more natural feel
findings: Dashboard card animations do not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query
Settings page has no transitions -- feels static compared to Login and Dashboard
